subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Thy spiritual letter was received and, although in one respect its contents caused us sorrow, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی مراسله روحانی آن جناب واصل از مضمون اگرچه بجهتی محزون شدیم زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort
